// @ts-ignore
import emailjs from'emailjs-com';import{EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID,EMAILJS_TEMPLATE_ID,EMAILJS_USER_ID}from'../constants';export const sendOrderEmail=async templateParams=>{try{console.log('Sending email with params:',templateParams);await emailjs.send(EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID,EMAILJS_TEMPLATE_ID,templateParams,EMAILJS_USER_ID);alert('Order receipt sent to provider');}catch(err){console.error('EmailJS error:',err);throw new Error('Failed to send email. Please check your EmailJS configuration and try again.');}};
